dialogue.line: All you had to do was keep eyes on the little green idiot.
You know the big man's gonna lose his mind over this--
And you know what that means for us.
That kid's impossible to miss anyways...
Loud and, glowing and, running around like he owns the place... can't stand him, he's annoying!
He'll pop up sooner or later...
Probably at that New Year's party those demon's throw every year--
All those people packed into ooonne spot.
Perfect place for something nasty to crawl back out...
And for us to grab him before he screws up anything else.
